title: Hotel Check-in
opening: Welcome to the Grand Hotel! Do you have a reservation with us this evening?

t1.prompt: Welcome to the Grand Hotel! Do you have a reservation with us this evening?
t1.promptTranslation: Welcome to the Grand Hotel! Do you have a reservation with us this evening? — Welcome to the Grand Hotel! Do you have a reservation with us this evening?

t2.prompt: Excellent. And under what name was the reservation made, please? We'll also need a form of photo identification, if you wouldn't mind.
t2.promptTranslation: Excellent. And under what name was the reservation made, please? We'll also need a form of photo identification, if you wouldn't mind. — Excellent. And under what name was the reservation made, please? We'll also need a form of photo identification, if you wouldn't mind.

t3.prompt: Thank you, Mr./Ms. [Learner's Name]. I see you've booked a standard double room. Do you have any particular preferences, perhaps a high floor or a quiet room? And how will you be settling the bill, with a credit card or other means?
t3.promptTranslation: Thank you, Mr./Ms. [Learner's Name]. I see you've booked a standard double room. Do you have any particular preferences, perhaps a high floor or a quiet room? And how will you be settling the bill, with a credit card or other means? — Thank you, Mr./Ms. [Learner's Name]. I see you've booked a standard double room. Do you have any particular preferences, perhaps a high floor or a quiet room? And how will you be settling the bill, with a credit card or other means?

t4.prompt: Right, we'll certainly do our best to accommodate your preferences. Just one more thing: our complimentary breakfast is served from 7 to 10 AM in the dining area. Would you like to add it to your booking?
t4.promptTranslation: Right, we'll certainly do our best to accommodate your preferences. Just one more thing: our complimentary breakfast is served from 7 to 10 AM in the dining area. Would you like to add it to your booking?

t5.prompt: Perfect. Here's your key card for room 402 on the fourth floor. Enjoy your stay with us, and please don't hesitate to contact the front desk if you require anything at all.
t5.promptTranslation: Perfect. Here's your key card for room 402 on the fourth floor. Enjoy your stay with us, and please don't hesitate to contact the front desk if you require anything at all.

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase or repeat what you said?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase or repeat what you said? — Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase or repeat what you said?

t-end.prompt: Thank you for choosing the Grand Hotel. Have a wonderful stay!
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you for choosing the Grand Hotel. Have a wonderful stay!
